title: I Got You (I Feel Good)
why_this_song: I Got You (I Feel Good) by James Brown (1965) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I knew that I would, now
I knew that I would, now
So nice, so nice, I got you
When I hold you in my arms
I know that I can do no wrong
And when I hold you in my arms

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "good" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "good" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "nice" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "nice" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I know that I can do no wrong
My love can't do me no harm

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I knew that I would, now
So nice, so nice, I got you
So nice, so nice, well I got you

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "I Got You (I Feel Good)" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "I Got You (I Feel Good)", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "I Got You (I Feel Good)" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "I Got You (I Feel Good)" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "I Got You (I Feel Good)", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "I Got You (I Feel Good)", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "I Got You (I Feel Good)" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "I Got You (I Feel Good)" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "I Got You (I Feel Good)" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "I Got You (I Feel Good)"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: "I Got You (I Feel Good)" was released in 1965. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "I Got You (I Feel Good)" foi lançada em 1965. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
